chain.thought: Explanation: The team made the playoffs in all years except 2005, 2009, and 2010. That means they made the playoffs in 2001, 2002, 2003, 2004, 2006, 2007, and 2008, totaling 7 years.

judge_thought:
Explanation:
The team made the playoffs in years where the playoffs column lists a qualifier (not "did not make playoffs"): 2001, 2002, 2003, 2004, 2006, 2007, and 2008. This totals 7 years. The years 2005, 2009, and 2010 indicate "did not make playoffs."
